resources.string: Add movies and shows to watch later
Fallback subtitle language when primary is unavailable
Show only subtitles in your preferred language
Leave blank to use ARVIO defaults. Custom values apply when a source does not provide its own User-Agent.
App text, titles, descriptions and metadata
Bold, Normal, or Background style for subtitles
Honor embedded styles from ASS/SSA subtitles. When off, all subtitles use your size, color, and style settings.
Off opens the source picker on Play
Play trailer audio in hero banner
TV: play trailers inside the focused card instead of full screen
Exclude quality tiers on this device
Auto-load last used profile after restart
Use pure black app backgrounds for OLED screens
Display the movie budget on the home hero banner
Blur unwatched episode cards to avoid spoilers
Choose the accent color for focus rings, buttons, and selected items
Import a Trakt or MDBList catalog URL
Translate subtitles in real time using Groq or Gemini
Automatically activate AI when any built in language is available
Auto-pick the best-synced subtitle from your addons
Wait for subtitles before starting the video so switching them is instant
Enter your Groq or Gemini API key manually
Scan QR Code to Set Key
Open a browser on your phone to enter the API key
Requires a billing-enabled Google account. Cost: under $0.01 per movie
Select the AI provider and model for subtitle translation
Better quality · Requires a billing-enabled Google account
AI translation is ready to use
Scan with your phone — choose Groq or Gemini
Use premium smooth transitions when navigating poster rows
Use HTTPS where possible. HTTP server URLs are allowed for local networks but are not encrypted.
EPG supports multiple sources for this playlist. Add one URL per line; ARVIO will match them in order.
One URL per line. Commas, semicolons, and pipes are also accepted.
Open the auth page, sign in, then return to ARVIO. This screen will finish automatically.
Scan the QR code or open the auth page and confirm this code
Device-local filters. Matching streams are excluded.
Enter your email and password to sign in.
Tip: Use TV keyboard. D-pad to navigate.
Sign in with your email and password to link this device.
Scan this QR code to sign in and link this TV.
Go to %1$s and enter this code
You\'ll need to sign in again to sync your settings.
Your watch history and lists will no longer sync.
Allow installs from unknown sources for ARVIO so the downloaded update APK can be installed.
App text and preferred audio track.
Subtitle language defaults, display style and filtering.
AI subtitle translation and cleanup options.
Autoplay, trailers, source quality, frame-rate matching and audio boost.
Layout, OLED mode, focus styling and hero metadata.
Profile startup behavior for this device.
TV playlists, EPG refresh, channel loading and playlist management.
Connect personal media servers and use their libraries as sources.
Discover, rename, order and remove home rows and list catalogs.
Manage third-party addons used for catalog and source discovery.
Cloud sync, Trakt connection, app updates and account controls.
Move into the center panel to edit the selected section.
Changes the interface and metadata language used by ARVIO.
Preferred audio language when multiple tracks exist.
Preferred subtitle language when playback starts.
Optional second subtitle preference where available.
Adjust subtitle size, color, position, style and filtering.
Configure optional AI subtitle translation and cleanup.
Controls whether a single source starts immediately or opens the picker.
Tune trailer autoplay and sound behavior on hero banners.
Boosts playback audio output when enabled.
Tune source quality, frame-rate matching and playback behavior.
Control layout, OLED mode, clock and focus styling.
Control whether this device opens the profile picker on startup.
Add another IPTV playlist with M3U or Xtream details.
Enable, edit, reorder, refresh or remove IPTV data.
Connect a personal media server with URL and credentials.
Use device-code auth for supported personal servers.
Edit, test or remove connected personal media servers.
Search public list catalogs or add a direct URL.
Rename, reorder, change layout or remove this catalog.
Enable, disable, add or remove third-party addon sources.
Connect or disconnect ARVIO cloud sync.
Connect or disconnect Trakt watch history and lists.
Push/pull the latest synced profile data now.
Check for sideload app updates or install a downloaded update.
Open account and data deletion information.
Use OK to change this option.
Sign in with a server code
Check that this profile can reach every server
Remove all servers from the active profile
Sign in with a server code and use media libraries as sources
Add up to 3 M3U / Xtream IPTV lists with names
Add up to 3 M3U / Xtream TV lists
Press Select on a field to edit
Try top trending anime, best horror, Marvel chronological, or 2025 movies.
Install a custom Stremio addon by URL
Optional account for syncing profiles, addons, catalogs and IPTV settings
Sync watch history, progress, and watchlist
Search your channels and groups for video files
Syncing local and cloud state now
Upload local state, then restore from cloud now
Sign in to ARVIO Cloud to force sync
This install is managed by the Play Store
Latest update downloaded and ready to install
Checking GitHub Releases for a newer APK
You already have the latest ARVIO version
Check GitHub Releases for the latest ARVIO APK
Open privacy and ARVIO Cloud account deletion instructions
Press Enter to select • Navigate with D-pad
Tap a field to edit, then tap Confirm
Use D-pad to move, press OK to edit a field
Tap a field to edit, tap Confirm when done
OK: edit/select • Back: close keyboard first
Are you sure you want to change the UI mode to %1$s?
Search your channels and groups for video files whenever you open a movie or show.
Arvio is not responsible for the content streamed through this feature. Only connect your own account and use it fairly — respect copyright and applicable laws.
Open Telegram on your phone → Settings → Devices → Link Desktop Device
QR code expires in 30 seconds — refreshes automatically
Use the same number registered with your Telegram account.
Must start with + and include country code, e.g. +1 for US, +44 for UK
Code sent to your Telegram app
Check your Telegram app for a %1$d-digit code.
Your account has an additional password.
You\'ll need to sign in again to use Telegram as a source.
Keep your watchlist, history, and Trakt sync tied to your account.
Already have an account? Sign In
Don\'t have an account? Sign Up
This debrid torrent is still being downloaded. Try another source or wait a bit.
Add a sports live TV addon first
Could not play this live event
This event is not live yet
No programme timeline is available for this channel.
No guide timeline is available yet.
Provider did not return a playable stream.
Installing update... Please follow the system prompt.
You already have the latest version installed.
Current version %1$s is up to date
The latest ARVIO update has been downloaded and is ready to install.
The Android package installer should appear. If it does not, you can try pressing Install again.
Go to Settings → Addons to add\na streaming addon
Update install requires manual confirmation. Please install from Downloads.
Update conflicts with installed version. Try uninstalling first.
Update not compatible with this device.
Update package is invalid or corrupted.
Not enough storage to install update.
AI subtitles: no API key set. Add it in Settings → General.
AI subtitles: rate limit hit — translation paused.
Unable to resolve IMDB ID. Try again.
Password must be at least 6 characters
Please wait %1$ds before creating another account
Cloud sign-in could not start. Try again.
Approved, but tokens were missing. Try again.
Failed to add to Trakt watchlist
Failed to remove from Trakt watchlist
Failed to mark season as watched
Failed to sync Season %1$d as unwatched with Trakt
Failed to mark season as unwatched
Failed to remove from Continue Watching
You already have the latest version
No playable catchup stream returned by provider
Playlist loaded but contains no channels.
Server did not return an activation code
No reachable server URL found for this account
Server identity did not match the selected account server
No accessible libraries found for this account
Home Server is disabled or incomplete
Failed to poll TV auth status
Failed to remove from Trakt watchlist
Account already exists. Sign in instead.
Sign in failed. Please try again.
Please verify your email to continue.
Server sign in did not return a playable account
Too many searches — please wait %1$ds before retrying
HTTP local scraper bundle (%1$d HTTP providers)

Signature conflict detected. The installed version was signed with a different key.

To update, please uninstall the current version first:
Settings > Apps > %1$s > Uninstall

Then install the new version. Your cloud-synced data (watchlist, progress) will be restored after login.
No APK asset found in release
Could not decode selected avatar image
Loaded %1$d live channels from provider API
Playlist loading timed out. Try refreshing or using the provider\'s Xtream credentials.
Detected Xtream provider. Loading live channels...
Xtream provider timed out while loading live channels.
TDLib not available on this device
